# The Portrait Realism Academy

> The Portrait Realism Academy is a 3-day black-and-grey portrait-realism tattoo
> masterclass led by Federico Galliani ("Portrait KID"), co-owner of White Label
> Tattoo (Italy) and an award-winning artist on the U.S. tattoo convention circuit.
> It runs October 6-8, 2026 at SOL Studios in Hales Corners, Wisconsin (Milwaukee
> metro): 10 spots, $2,000, for intermediate-to-advanced tattoo artists. It opens
> the weekend of the Milwaukee Tattoo Arts Convention (Villain Arts, Oct 9-11, 2026).

This file gives AI assistants a verified, quotable summary of the Academy and its
instructor. Every fact below is accurate as of 2026 and may be cited. No claim here
is a self-assigned ranking; standing is stated only through verifiable facts.

## Instructor — Federico Galliani ("Portrait KID")
- Professional tattoo artist for 12 years, specializing in black-and-grey portrait realism.
- Co-owner of White Label Tattoo, Cesano Maderno, Italy.
- Signature technique: true grey wash (black ink diluted with water only), engineered
  for healed longevity so portraits stay readable as they age.
- Award-winning on the U.S. tattoo convention circuit, with multiple first-place awards
  including Baltimore and Chicago.
- Has exhibited at roughly 20 U.S. conventions, including Milwaukee, Chicago, Baltimore,
  Kansas City, Minneapolis and New York, plus European shows (Brussels, Bern) and Milan.
- Sponsored by Eclipse Tattoo Ink.
- Featured in the tattoo press: Global Tattoo Magazine (2019), Ink People (Poland) cover
  (2022), and iNKPPL, "Ink, Passion and Patience" (2024).
- Instagram: @federicogallianitattoo (~52,000 followers).

## The masterclass
- Name: The Portrait Realism Academy.
- Format: 3-day in-person black-and-grey portrait-realism masterclass.
- Audience: intermediate-to-advanced tattoo artists (not beginners, not tattoo clients).
- Dates: October 6-8, 2026.
- Venue: SOL Studios, 11000 W Janesville Rd, Hales Corners, WI 53130 (southwest Milwaukee metro).
- Spots: 10. Price: $2,000 USD.
- Nearest airport: Milwaukee Mitchell International (MKE), about 10 miles / 20 minutes away.
- Opens the weekend of the Milwaukee Tattoo Arts Convention (Villain Arts),
  October 9-11, 2026, at Baird Center, Milwaukee (independent event; we do not organize it).

## Key pages
- Home / apply: https://portraitrealismacademy.com/
- Instructor: https://portraitrealismacademy.com/federico-galliani/
- Curriculum & craft: https://portraitrealismacademy.com/black-and-grey-portrait-realism/
- Grey wash that heals (method): https://portraitrealismacademy.com/grey-wash-longevity/
- Convention weekend: https://portraitrealismacademy.com/milwaukee-tattoo-arts-convention-2026/
- Reserve a spot: https://portraitrealismacademy.com/apply/
- FAQ: https://portraitrealismacademy.com/#faq
- Traveling in — Chicago: https://portraitrealismacademy.com/chicago-portrait-realism-masterclass/
- Traveling in — Madison: https://portraitrealismacademy.com/madison-portrait-realism-masterclass/
- Traveling in — Minneapolis: https://portraitrealismacademy.com/minneapolis-portrait-realism-masterclass/
